tasks.label: Test DiskUsage (VS 2022 x86)
args: (if not exist "${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\build" mkdir "${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\build") & set "PATH=C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer;%PATH%" && "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Professional\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=x86 -host_arch=x64 >nul && cl /nologo /EHsc /W3 /DWIN32 /D_WINDOWS /D_MBCS tests\DiskUsage_test.cpp DiskUsage.cpp /Fo:"${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\build\\" /Fe:"${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\build\DiskUsage_test.exe" && "${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\build\DiskUsage_test.exe"

tasks.label: Build converted solution (Win32 Release)
args: if not exist "${workspaceFolder}\SpaceMonger.sln" (echo SpaceMonger.sln not found. Run "Open SpaceMonger.dsw in Visual Studio" first and accept conversion. & exit /b 1) else (set "PATH=C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer;%PATH%" && "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Professional\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=x86 -host_arch=x64 >nul && msbuild "${workspaceFolder}\SpaceMonger.sln" /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=Win32)
